creator: dickey@invisible-island.net
text:
On Wed, 29 Jul 2009, Ulrich Spoerlein wrote:

> Hi Thomas! You nailed it!
>
> The attached patch will make -hold behave like a good citizen. It would
> be interesting to see if other BSDs are affected or if FreeBSD 5.x is
> affected, too.

thanks.  I'm curious if there's more than one reason that size==0 would
be returned from the read() call - that's something I want to check on.
But it's good to know that we're talking about the same bug.

-- 
Thomas E. Dickey
http://invisible-island.net
ftp://invisible-island.net
